service.description: Type of appointment. sportova_prehliadka = sports medical exam (7:00-8:40), vstupne_vysetrenie = initial visit (9:00-11:50), kontrolne_vysetrenie = follow-up after treatment (13:00-14:30), zdravotnicka_pomocka = medical device prescription (9:00-11:50 or 13:00-14:30, max 1 per day), konzultacia = paid express consultation 30 EUR (14:40-14:50).

date.description: Requested appointment date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use this when the caller asks for availability on a day but does not specify an exact time.

start_time.description: Requested appointment start time in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset, for example 2026-04-03T10:00:00+02:00. Use this when the caller gives an exact time.
